summary: Completed comprehensive testing of login bug fixes (iteration 4). All critical login flows verified: role-based redirects, already-logged-in auto-redirect, failed login session preservation, empty submit blocking, error handling, demo accounts, case-insensitive login, and logout functionality.

design_issues.issue: Console warnings about chart width/height being -1 (Recharts library)
design_issues.impact: No user-facing impact, charts render correctly
design_issues.note: This is a known Recharts issue when charts render before container dimensions are calculated

passed_tests: Backend: All 5 roles login successfully (super_admin, school_admin, accountant, teacher, parent)
Backend: Wrong credentials return 401 with proper error message
Backend: Email with trailing spaces works
Backend: Response structure correct (access_token + user object)
Frontend: Login page loads with all form elements
Frontend: Submit button disabled when email or password empty
Frontend: Demo account 'tap to fill' buttons work correctly
Frontend: Wrong credentials show error toast 'Invalid email or password'
Frontend: School admin login redirects to / (dashboard)
Frontend: Already-logged-in admin visiting /login auto-redirects to /
Frontend: Logout button works and redirects to /login
Frontend: Already-logged-in parent visiting /login auto-redirects to /parent
Frontend: Case-insensitive and trim-safe login works (mixed case + spaces)
Frontend: Session integrity maintained (verified by accessing protected routes)

critical_fixes_verified: ✅ Already-logged-in redirect: Users visiting /login when authenticated are immediately redirected to their appropriate dashboard (parent → /parent, others → /)
✅ Failed login session preservation: The axios interceptor now excludes '/auth/login' from 401-triggered logout, preventing valid sessions from being wiped by failed login attempts
✅ Empty submit blocked: Submit button is disabled when email or password fields are empty
✅ Error handling: Wrong credentials show clear error toast 'Invalid email or password'
✅ Demo accounts: All demo account buttons work correctly
✅ Case-insensitive login: Email is trimmed and lowercased (both backend and frontend)
✅ Role-based redirects: Parent → /parent, all other roles → /
✅ Logout: Works correctly and redirects to /login
notes.session_expiry_note: Session expiry flow (stv:auth-expired event) is implemented in code but not directly testable via UI without manually corrupting tokens. The implementation is correct: axios interceptor fires 'stv:auth-expired' event on 401 from non-login endpoints, AuthContext listens and clears user state, ProtectedRoute bounces to /login.
notes.test_coverage: All features from the review request have been tested and verified working correctly. Both backend API and frontend UI integration are functioning as expected.
